name: Bolt
description: Lightning bolts striking a new way on every redraw.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg, 180deg, 270deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(52% 4%, 24% 56%, 46% 56%, 38% 96%, 78% 40%, 54% 40%, 64% 4%); clip-path: polygon(52% 4%, 24% 56%, 46% 56%, 38% 96%, 78% 40%, 54% 40%, 64% 4%); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
